programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: When Jestro awakens, he’s been blasted miles and miles away from the King’s Castle by Merlok’s explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. It seems the Book of Monsters broke Jestro’ fall.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro finds the Book of Chaos in the countryside and decides he must feed it to the book. The Book of Monsters actually tells Jestro NOT to feed it to him; he tells Jestro he’s not ready for that kind of power. But Jestro doesn’t listen.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro finds the Book of Chaos in the countryside and decides he must feed it to the book. The Book of Monsters actually tells Jestro NOT to feed it to him; he tells Jestro he’s not ready for that kind of power.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Searching through the dark forests of the realm, Jestro finds “The Book of Fear.” It’s pretty scary. But he feeds it to the Book of Monsters, and he uses it to call forth WHIPPERELLA, and the monster that can induce fear.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: It’s movie time! Lance does something very Lance: he agrees to star in a movie about the remake of a classic film in Knighton: “The Golden Castle.”

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: The Knights travel to the Hill Country in the northern part of Knighton to Axl’s hometown of DIGGINTON (where they realize that all of Axl’s family look just like him.) While they’re there, Merlok 2.0 detects something…one of the Magic Books!

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro, happy he has the REAL Book of Deception, uses it to create bad versions of the NEXO-Knights. The “fake” knights then attack villages and hamlets. When the real NEXO-Knights arrive, they’re booed and pelted with food.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.”

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Jestro, while still attacking the King’s Castle, has second thoughts until the Book of Monsters orders the mad jester to feed him another magic book he’s found (and has been saving.) It’s the powerful “Book of Revenge!”

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special

programme.title: True Life Crime

programme.title: True Life Crime

programme.title: Catfish Colombia

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: By age 20, Steve Lamb was making millions trafficking marijuana by sea.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: Sean Salley shoots an actress and her friends above a deli in New York.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: Two members of a Texas separatist group flee following a hostage standoff.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: Lane Slettvet kills a drug dealer, then tries to stay under the radar.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: A witness to a murder flees and spends decades living under a fake name.

programme.title: Runs Good
programme.desc: What was supposed to be an unfinished project feels more like a mechanic special; with problem after problem, it looks like this car was closer to ending up in a landfill than laying down 11s leaving the car meet.

programme.title: Engine Masters
programme.desc: One thousand horsepower is all too common these days and all too accessible. With these numbers well within reach, it's time we looked into two ways to get there: a supercharger on a medium-sized mill; and natural aspiration atop large-displacement.

programme.title: Engine Masters
programme.desc: As a longtime promoter of tunnel rams, Freiburger is often asked about running a four-barrel carb vs dual quads on the tunnel ram; he answers with a setup for guys who are all about the look and presence of the tunnel ram.

programme.title: Dirt Every Day
programme.desc: Fred Williams and Dave Chappelle hitch a small boat to the back of a Yamaha Wolverine UTV and head to New Mexico; the plan is to explore the Southern Rockies, find a nice mountain lake, and maybe catch some trout, but that might not be it.

programme.title: Dirt Every Day
programme.desc: Fred Williams and Dave Chappelle decide to build a budget bouncer from a Dodge Truck with a V-10 engine, calling it the "Rock Viper.

programme.title: Speed Is the New Black
programme.desc: The crew is challenged to bring a perfectly running, near-flawless Porsche and a new Cadillac CTS-V to the next level.

programme.title: Speed Is the New Black
programme.desc: Noah has his hands full modifying a 1957 Chevy Bel Air for a married couple with two separate visions; a mystery client has high demands for turning a 1969 Camaro into a luxury ride.

programme.title: Head 2 Head
programme.desc: Iconic cars go against one another in a battle for bragging rights.

programme.title: Head 2 Head Drag Race
programme.desc: Exploring whether BMW maintains the title of undisputed fast sedan king.

programme.title: Super Turbo Story Time
programme.desc: Rule benders and sneaky geniuses: these are stories of creative risk takers who know that sometimes you have to break the rules to be the hero.

programme.title: Super Turbo Story Time
programme.desc: There are a million ways to modify a car, but few like these stories. From a manufacturer creating a narrow-use case spec, to one guy making a complete unicorn in his garage, we celebrate some forgotten oddballs of the mod world.

programme.title: Roadkill's Junkyard Gold
programme.desc: Steve returns to Fresno, California, turning up buried treasures and looking for potential projects for the gang at Roadkill; along the way, he shares some lessons on engine cooling and big-block history.

programme.title: Roadkill's Junkyard Gold
programme.desc: Steve is at Desert Valley Auto Parts in Phoenix and strikes gold in the form of a rusty 1964 Ford Galaxie XL; the next stop for that car is over at Roadkill; he also uncovers some muscle from Chevy, Oldsmobile and Buick.

programme.title: Shorty's Dream Shop
programme.desc: Shorty takes on the huge challenge of making a Vietnam veteran's long-bed '69 C10 cool; he hopes to achieve that by taking the truck back to stock, with original two-tone paint and moldings, a new stance, updated interior and new wheels.

programme.title: Runs Good
programme.desc: A shop owner's crew builds a SR20-powered Ford Ranger Urban Assault Vehicle, but when the turbo gives out, he knows it needed to go before it become more of a distraction; Aaron fixes the reliability issues; Dan and Shea go in on suspension.

programme.title: Engine Masters
programme.desc: A look at how oil kills power because it's not about synthetic versus regular oil and not about a brand-to-brand comparison, but about windage and oil-pan design.

programme.title: Engine Masters
programme.desc: The Engine Masters go to the originator of the Big Bang Theory dyno test, Richard Holdener, to find out how big a junkyard Chevy LS engine with a turbo can go.

programme.title: Dirt Every Day
programme.desc: The Dirt-Heads choose a big Dodge diesel mud truck on 65-inch tractor tires to fix it up before they go experience the mud life in Okeechobee, Fla.

programme.title: Dirt Every Day
programme.desc: Fred Williams' 1986 Toyota rock crawler, Clampy, has been sitting for about five years and it's time for an adventure; Fred and Dave Chappelle blow off the vehicle's cobwebs and head out from California to find every type of off-road terrain.

programme.title: Runs Good

programme.desc: When Lola advances to a regional pageant she worries she could lose for the first time; Dad has Mr. Grouse watch Lily while he goes to a concert but things quickly start to go wrong.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When termites infest the house, half the family stays with Pop Pop and the others stay with Aunt Ruth; Lincoln has to complete a woodworking assignment, but has a history of failure on the topic.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The origin of the woman called Bishop; a look into Bishop's reasons to hate mutants, and the secret of the Mechazoids.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Clyde discovers he didn't earn junior administrator job, but can't give up the perks that come along with it; when the new girl starts hanging around Lincoln and his friends, they begin to suspect she likes one of them.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The older sisters reluctantly let Lynn into their baby-sitting club, but she quickly proves to be too aggressive; Ronnie Anne's grandparents decide to spy on her when she wants to go downtown.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Hoping to win a songwriting contest, Luna contemplates whether she should go with a song that's true to her sound or try to make something that the whole world will love.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After witnessing an excess of lying in the family, Lisa invents lie-detecting glasses to try and curb the fibs; Lincoln asks to borrow Clyde's new gaming system, but Clyde struggles to trust that it's safe with him.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Torn between her work friends and her school friends, Leni tries to bring everyone together; when Lincoln and Clyde go to tour the middle school, Lynn gives them some questionable advice.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After agreeing to go to the Royal Woods House of Terror, Lincoln and Clyde have to toughen up and face their fears; Lola discovers that Lucy has an old, fragile doll and decides she must borrow it.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Faced with spending Thanksgiving apart, Lori and Bobby try to bring their crazy families together for the first time.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After discovering he has rituals, Lincoln worries he's predictable and vows to change things up; Lori develops the yips when she finds out that the golf coach from her dream college is coming to see her play.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After a pun-filled trip to the grocery store with Luan and Lola, Dad worries Lola thinks he plays favorites; when Lynn's friend Margo is celebrated for a one-in-a million soccer goal, Lynn tries to be supportive.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Lucy quits the writing club at school due to the by-the-book way Huggins runs the club, Mom takes over; Luna and Sam embark on a challenge taking place across Royal Woods and discover they have less in common than they thought.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Luan tries out for the school play to get closer to her crush, Benny; when Clyde and schoolmate Zach begin bonding over a mutual interest in antiques, Lincoln quickly finds himself feeling like a third wheel.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The kids promise to help Dad with the grand opening of his new restaurant by coming up with promotions, but their lack of teamwork and crazy promos lead to an ultimate nightmare in the kitchen for Dad.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne makes friends with Sid, a girl whose family wants to rent the apartment upstairs; when it looks like another couple might get it first, the girls resort to sabotage to try and dissuade them.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When a high utility bill threatens Hector and Rosa's annual trip, Ronnie Anne spearheads an effort to lower usage; desperate for their own space, Ronnie Anne and Sid find a hidden room and try to keep it from the other tenants.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Carl witnesses Ronnie Anne save a dog, he becomes obsessed with being just like his newfound hero; Ronnie Anne secretly starts watching her family's favorite telenovela after refusing to watch it with them.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iCarly le pide a sus fanáticos que le manden videos bailando - pero cuando llegan miles, Carly, Sam y Freddie se quedan dormidos intentarlos ver todos.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam y Freddie hacen su webcast de Halloween desde un apartamento que se rumora estar embrujado.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam y Freddie deben frustrar el plan de Nevel para piratear a iCarly; Plain White T's interpreta "Our Time Now".

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Cuando Sam es detenido en la noche del show espectacular en la Web número 50 de iCarly, Carly y Freddie hacen lo imposible por también ser detenidos.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam y Freddie son invitados a Daka Headquarters en donde les ofrecen una gran suma de dinero por promocionar los nuevos zapatos Daka, los Tech-Foot. Pero los zapatos son terribles.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Cuando Carly obtiene una B en historia, Sam cambia la calificación de Carly a una A. Carly y Freddie idean un plan para entrar al sistema computacional y restaurar las calificaciones reales.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: La emoción del grupo por estar en la televisión disminuye después de que la cadena hacer grandes cambios al programa.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam y su nuevo novio son inseparables; Spencer intenta crear una película de animación de arcilla.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Dos detectives deciden usar el ático de Carly y Spencer para una vigilancia; Freddie pierde una apuesta con Sam.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam y Freddie están molestos cuando Carly recibe la oferta de una beca completa para una escuela privada de élite; Spencer crea un campo de golf miniatura.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie necesita pasar algo de tiempo con los chicos por lo que sale con Spencer para ir a la esgrima. Las cosas se complican cuando Spencer involucra a Freddie en un combate con un profesional.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: A Gibby le gusta una chica de su clase, pero es demasiado tímido para proponerle una cita, por lo que los chicos deciden ayudarlo organizando un programa de citas en iCarly. Mientras tanto, Spencer busca novia en Internet.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: La Srita. Ackerman termina con su novio, provoca una pelea con sus alumnos. Pero una visita de Spencer para resolver el conflicto se transforma en una cita.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: En el primero de este especial de tres partes, el show de Carly es invitado a Japón para competir por los Premios iWeb - una competencia internacional que celebra a lo mejor del Internet.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Después de un accidentado vuelo y de un salto imprevisto, Carly y el grupo se hacen amigos del programa japonés rival. Sin embargo, las cosas se complican cuando sus `amigos' japoneses intentan sacar de la competencia a iCarly.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Perdidos en una tierra extranjera, Carly, Sam y Freddie deben llegar a la premiación y exponer las trampas de quienes los traicionaron.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly y Sam ambas se enamoran del amigo de Freddie, Shane, para decidir quién saldrá con él las chicas intentan lograr que él bese a una de ellas.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly debe intervenir cuando Spencer se vuelve adicto a un juego de video; Sam engaña a Freddie haciéndole creer que él tiene mala suerte.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie acusa a Sam de no pagar el dinero que tomó prestado; Spencer ayuda a una niña pequeña a vender chocolates.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Cuando Lewbert resulta herido durante una presentación, el grupo intenta ayudarlo a recuperar su salud; Spencer molesta a los camioneros.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Cuando Carly, Sam, y Spencer llevan a Freddie a su tienda de pays favorita, ellos se enteran que el propietario ha fallecido. Y al parecer sus recetan se han perdido para siempre.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly se enfada con Spencer porque su escultura de árbol de navidad magnético se ha incendiado y ha quemado todos los regalos de las fiestas. Carly desea tener un hermano normal y su petición se cumple, pero ciertos deseos pueden ser muy peligrosos.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam escucha confesar a Freddie que él nunca ha besado a una chico, luego expone su secreto en el programa. Gibby y Carly entrenan a Spencer para la audición de un equipo de fútbol profesional.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Cuando están en el aire, Freddie revela que él no es un admirador de una sensación en el Internet; Spencer deja que una albóndiga mágica tome decisiones por él.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam y Freddie espían para asistir a una pelea de artes marciales mixtas; Spencer construye una versión gigante de Newton Balls.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam y Freddie reciben una asignación escolar de crear un proyecto original que beneficia al medio ambiente.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Un cantante gana un concurso de la televisión después que un webcast de iCarly causa un enorme incremento de votos.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly trata de ayudar a Sam cuando ella admite que está enamorada de un chico en la escuela; Spencer está convencida de que una chica le gusta a causa de su esmoquin.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Spencer se molesta cuando Carly empieza a salir con un nuevo chico que tiene muy mala reputación. Carly descubre que su nuevo novio tiene un secreto impresionante.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Cuando Missy, la vieja amiga de Carly regresa a Seattle, Sam cree que Missy está intentando reemplazarla como la mejor amiga de Carly; Spencer queda atrapado en el área de almacenamiento de un sótano.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam y Freddie pierden el URL de iCarly y lo consigue Nevel, quien exige un beso de Carly para devolvérselo. Por otra parte, Spencer pide 200 almohadas por error.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam y Freddie son obligados a compartir el mismo casillero después de ganar un concurso en la escuela; Carly le pide a Spencer darle clases de arte.

programme.desc: Tony answers the top 10 viewer questions from an online poll.

programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain sets out to rediscover the energy he loves in New York.

programme.desc: Anthony explores the food culture in Quebec.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain's Japanese trip begins in Osaka at an underground bar.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Je’nier has a wild secret to share with Preston. Then, it’s Nikki and Nikky going after one man! Will Nikki or Nikky win Kevin’s heart? Does Kevin deserve either’s love?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Sheene’s got a secret to reveal to Derrick that may threaten their relationship. Tabitha thinks her man TJ might be cheating again. Plus, Xeo and James are going head to head for the same woman.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jamie is here to tell his ex-lover that he actually left her for a guy! Next Amy says her ex-boyfriend is a chronic cheater and she wants nothing to do with him. Then Jasmine is here to teII her boyfriend that she's really a man!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Pimp Hotlanta will set Nika straight about their relationship. Stephanie confronts her pal Erika for having sex with her man. Gloria was crushed when she found out that her sister stole her man.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Unemployed Sebastian has been badgering his girlfriend Dee to take up any kind of work. Later Steve tells his girlfriend that he's secretly been videotaping and broadcasting them over the Internet!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Today Mark will be forced to choose between his lover, Amy, and his wife. Next Michelle is here to dump her lover for her ex-boyfriend, Frankie. Later, Erikka lives with her boyfriend but her heart belongs to her friend, Larry.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Michael cheated on his wife Alecia with a stripper who may now be pregnant. Sarah confronts a stripper named Amy who she says slept with her man. Missy is here to lay down the laws of the strip club.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: John is cheating on his wife Destinee with Cici, but Cici's got some secrets too. Then, Lala drops a bombshell on her man. Plus Michael and his wife Tayliana both have secrets to reveal to each other.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Friends and family refuse to accept same-sex marriage! Martin won’t let his son marry his boyfriend. April wants her ex back, but he’s in love with a man! Who has the final say?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: A battle of brides on today’s Jerry Springer Show. Nicole issues an ultimatum to her lover: Dump her or lose me. Jerry watches as sparks fly on today’s show!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Johnny wants his girlfriend Aimee to accept him for who he is. Then, Maya comes on the show to confront her boyfriend Eric about his tendencies.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Penny busted her super-sized husband, Chris, and her cousin, Christy, together. Next Rovin is here to confront her best friend for sleeping with Chucky, Robin's boyfriend. But Chucky shocks both women when he introduces them to his new lover, Arthur!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Holiday food fights, proposals, poetry and North Pole dancers, this episode has it all.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jaycee shows Brandy that it’s never ok to cheat and ruin a family. Casi feels her fiancé could learn a lesson from past guest Kevin. Plus, we set viewer Tamara and guest Nathan up on a date.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Gail needs more excitement in her life so she's been sleeping with her boyfriend's best friend! Next Dave finds out that his girlfriend of 3 years is having an affair. He says he's willing to do anything to get her back, even wear her bra!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Shawn proposed to Nicole after she said she was carrying his baby but refused to show him any proof and then claimed a miscarriage. Next, Kamesha believed Derrick was the one but began to doubt his fidelity. Will these couples make it to the altar?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: After Cassarah became Tim's live-in nanny, they began a sexual relationship. Her family is livid over the 26 year age gap and claims that he takes her to swingers' parties. Can Steve help Cassarah leave this dysfunctional relationship?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Korey says his girlfriend Dominique is a cheater and his suspicions about her job has caused major problems in their relationship. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin is unfaithful!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jaycee le demuestra a Brandy que nunca es correcto ser infiel y arruinar a una familia. Casi cree que su prometido podría aprender una lección de Kevin, un antiguo invitado. Además, concertamos una cita entre la espectadora Tamara y el invitado Nathan.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Anitra se entera de quién es realmente su pareja Kevin! Después, James está a semanas de casarse con Liz, pero tiene dos importantes secretos que contar. Después, Elliot dice que cometió el peor error de su vida al ser infiel a su novio, Rob.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: James está comprometido con Amanda, pero ahora confiesa lo de Melanie. Después, Jewel compite por el amor de su amante cuando Christa anuncia que lo quiere para ella.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Misty odia tanto al marido que se acaba de casar con su mejor amiga que está dispuesta a pagar el divorcio. ¡Lucus está dispuesto a divorciarse de su esposa de 6 semanas si su familia no deja de entrometerse!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Hope ha venido a enfrentarse a su mejor amiga, Laura, por robarle a su novio, Joey, y luego comprometerse con él. A continuación, John dirá que no tiene la culpa por acostarse con la mejor amiga de su novia.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Kenny vivía con dos hermanas, Lora y Misty, que también son sus amantes, pero las trata como sirvientas. Después, Jerry confronta a Kenny con los resultados de 9 pruebas de paternidad positivas, pero Kenny dice que solamente le importan 2 de sus 9 hijos.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Anita está dispuesta a dejar a su marido por su ex-amante. Luego Theresa está siendo infiel a su prometido con su hermano. Más tarde Kevin viene a decirle al ex de su novia, Jermaine, que se aleje.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Carl ha venido a decirle a su novia que se ha estado acostando con su peor enemiga, Keisha. A continuación, Donte le dirá a su mejor amigo, Quincy, que está acostándose con su prometida. Después, Janel y Nikkie están peleando por el mismo hombre.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Kiki y Kat eran compañeras de trabajo que se enamoraron. ¡Pero ahora Kat dejará a Kiki por un hombre! Después, Cedric viene a decirle a su novia que quiere llevar su relación a otro nivel... y a otra persona.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Fred engañó a su amante Jay, ¡así que ahora Jay quiere su merecido! A continuación, la obsesión de Terry por su panda de peluche está a punto de hacer que su novia se vaya. Después, Benny le dirá a su amigo que usa ropa interior de mujer en secreto.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Dave cuenta que los regaños constantes de su novia lo han arrojado a los brazos de una mujer de 72 años! A continuación, Joe está a punto de decirle a su hermosa novia que tuvo un rollo de una noche con alguien increíble.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Josh y Amy descubrirán hoy que sus parejas han sido infieles. Después Madeline le contará a Andre que ha estado acostándose con Diante. Después, Quincy está comprometido con Callie pero ella no sabe que Quincy ha sido infiel con Amy.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jen le contará a John que lo va a dejar por su amante secreto, Jerry, de 73 años. Después, Danika tiene una sorpresita para su prometido y se siente obligada a decirle que ella realmente es un hombre.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: John pesa casi 700 libras y no podría ser más feliz. Su novia Kim le hace elegir entre ella y un sándwich de 3 metros de largo. Él elige el sándwich.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura es interrogada por el Comisario, quien de inmediato se da cuenta que ella está mintiendo al ver la forma en la que se contradice en sus declaraciones.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En la comisaría, Rosaura es arduamente interrogada por el comisario, quien sospecha de su inocencia. Él la presiona a decir la verdad.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Al saber la verdad sobre la inocencia de Rosaura, Iván conversa con Karina y intenta convencerla de entregarse a la policía para que asuma su culpa.

programme.title: Acorralada

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote shows us how saving turtles can be a hobby if done the right way!

programme.title: Uncaged
programme.desc: Coral reefs are diverse underwater ecosystems.

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: Every animal empire needs a refuge to call home. For some, impassable seas block predators. For others, the size and vulnerability of their young is a saving grace. One thing in common is the importance of protection in the continuation of their empire.

programme.title: Penguin Party
programme.desc: Few animals are more loved than penguins waddling on ice like clumsy people.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: We say goodbye to another old friend as Beryl leaves Cheetah Outreach. We check in on meerkat couple Sebastian and Minkie to see if they have made it.

programme.title: Waterlife
programme.desc: Estuaries have the capacity to provide food for billions of living beings.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Kangaroo
programme.desc: Male kangaroos live lives full of risk and reward. While females live in established home ranges and cluster in largely peaceful social groups, bucks' lives are more hazardous.

programme.title: World of Oceans
programme.desc: Animals depend on more than just food for survival; Like us, they need shelter to protect themselvs and their young.

programme.title: Beast Legends
programme.desc: In the ancestral Navaho lands of New Mexico, the Beast Seekers investigate the legend of a giant bird predator the size of a small airplane.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: On Today’s Animal Park, Kate Humble prepares a thorny treat for the Giraffes and Ben Fogle is on the run with the pigmy goats and a keeper’s worst nightmare unfolds as an animal escapes!

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Ben Fogle is on hand at Longleat Safari Park today when a veterinary emergency threatens the life a rare species of deer and Kate Humble is the first to be introduced to a pair of new sea lion pups

programme.title: Great Lakes Wild
programme.desc: A colony of elk in Burwash, on a former prison ground, is thriving. Researcher David McGeachy takes us out to see these majestic elk up close during mating season, when their explosive energy means you don’t quite know what to expect.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: Emily makes a brand new friend. Joseph continues to teach the public about cheetahs, while Chobi continues to baffle the staff and doctors with medical problems.

programme.title: Wonderful Wetlands
programme.desc: Water provides a haven; it can be a nursery, a migration stop, a larder and a home.

programme.title: Wildest Places: Pacific
programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A man crosses paths with a grizzly, and something unknown strikes a surfer.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul and Jimmy remove a gator from under an Elvis impersonator's car.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Scott must thrust his arm down a crocodile's throat to remove a flip-flop.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul must combat deadly gators with only new volunteer Caroline to assist.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: A tiger loose in the streets of suburban New Jersey tips off locals to a larger and potentially deadly problem. Meanwhile, a man's insistence on keeping tigers costs one person their life.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: A Wisconsin school teacher follows his dream of owning a two-ton Asian elephant but isn't prepared for the inevitable. Doug Terranova, a former circus performer, wants his young daughters to follow in his footsteps.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Ecuador
programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive in Ecuador's jungles by building bamboo bridges, making a bow and arrow, and showing which plants are poisonous.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Kimberly, Australia
programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive in the harsh Australian outback by taking extreme measures to avoid sunstroke, finding food, and avoiding the deadly 'Salties' - saltwater crocodiles.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Mexico
programme.desc: In Mexico's Copper Canyon Adventurer Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive by using traditional cave shelters, fishing without lines or nets, and finding scorpions and grubs to eat.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Iceland
programme.desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls shows how to survive in Iceland's Arctic conditions. Bear demonstrates how to make a snow cave, find water in deep tunnels, and avoid frostbite. Half a million tourists visit every year to see the freezing glaciers.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: After only a short time in the wild, the men find that extreme isolation is beginning to take its toll.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: As the days pass, the remaining survivalists show signs of cracking.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Two men remain on Vancouver Island as the storm of the year blows in.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Meet the 10 new participants on Alone Season 2 and see what it takes to make the cut. From exhaustive skills tests to camera and safety training.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy crash a raucous brew-fest to sneak an ATV away from a crowd of tipsy revelers. Then, Matt and Lou come face-to-face with a fraternity prank gone awry - these college kids have a sledgehammer, and they're not afraid to use it.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.desc: The team is ahead of schedule on their Vegas mission, but will it all be derailed when Froy brings unwanted trouble back to the office? Also, Ronnie and Froy run into an unexpected dilemma when a husband's better halves take the reins.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: An Elvis impersonator gets Matt and Ronnie all shook up, and a ventriloquist's dummy has a nasty attitude that gets on Sonia's bad side. When Froy goes missing, Lou has to pick up the slack in a repo that goes terribly wrong.

programme.title: Overboard
programme.desc: After going 'overboard' on his yacht, a spoiled, rich playboy (Eugenio Derbez) with amnesia is convinced by a single mother (Ana Faris) that he is her husband and is set to work for the first time in his life! But can a lie keep a new love together?

programme.title: Licorice Pizza

programme.desc: Attila the Hun, the barbarian horseman who terrorized Europe, battles Alexander the Great, history's greatest military tactician.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are taken outdoors where they struggle to forge a blade in the noonday sun. In the final round, two smiths must create the ultimate wilderness weapon: the German Sawback Hunting Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: In a grueling Forged In Fire first, four bladesmiths must forge not just one, but three knives from railroad spikes in only three hours. Time management is essential for hammering out three functional knives that can withstand a brutal round of testing.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths must forge a fully functional serrated knife using steel from hand scissors. After two rounds, the final two competitors must create a challenging weapon from history: the Sengese.

programme.desc: Tyra picks up her camera for a scary impromptu photo shoot.

programme.desc: The queens get into their sis-boom-bah as they take on a cheerleading challenge that tests their stunting skills, with the B-52s guest judging.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a man who disappears after a late-night dive, and Danny and Elena take their relationship to another level. MARTIN LANDAU and ADAM KAUFMAN guest star.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and his team investigate the case of a 28-year-old marketing executive, Maggie Cartwright, who seems to have simply walked away from her life, leaving everything behind.

programme.title: Without A Trace

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Duncan Muller realizes that he needs to go back into a store to retrieve his credit card. After he walks away, his wife's car speeds off, leaving a bystander injured.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The agents must find a woman, Eve, who changes her appearance to suit whatever modeling or acting job she is seeking. No one seems to know Eve well, including her roommate.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and his squad search for 17-year-old Andy Deaver, who was last seen by the charismatic headmaster of Spalding Academy, the private boarding school Andy attends.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a controversial senior leader from Egypt comes to New York for a heart transplant, OA struggles to balance his personal opinion with his professional duty when he is assigned to the security detail.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a decorated FBI agent is murdered, the team investigates and uncovers the man who led a double life.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A woman with information about the death of Maggie's husband is abducted leading the team to uncover a criminal operation larger than anyone imagined.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a bomb detonates at a restaurant in Queens, the case becomes personal for OA, who grew up eating there.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After the son of a prominent Mommy blogger is kidnapped, the team must sweep through her two million followers to find the culprit.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a front-running female presidential candidate, Valerie Caldwell, is targeted with a car bomb, OA and Maggie must hurry to track down the bomber before they strike again.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a shooting at a nightclub, it appears that the FBI may have ignored previous threats from a local white supremacist group.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A loving husband and father of two, Jim Russo, is kidnapped after accidentally getting involved in illegal dealings far beyond what he imagined.

programme.desc: The story of Richard Kuklinski, the notorious contract killer and family man. When finally arrested in 1986, neither his wife nor daughters had any clue about his real profession.

When a student writes the police code for homicide, 187, inside a textbook owned by teacher Trevor Garfield, he feels threatened.

programme.desc: When the world's heavyweight champion is sent to prison, everything points to an inevitable showdown with the penitentiary's undefeated champ. But to make sure the meeting will happen, a former mob boss must call in favors from the outside world.

programme.desc: When an international team of former Cold War intelligence adversaries meet in a Warehouse, their venture of friendship, intrigue and betrayal has just begun.

programme.desc: A female pirate and her companion race against their rivals to find a hidden island that contains a fabulous treasure.

programme.desc: John, a half-bright loser stranded in Reno, is down to his last few bucks when Sydney, taking pity on him, buys him breakfast and offers him a few tips on making money in the casinos. Two years later, John has become Sydney's partner.

programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of the family behind the Italian fashion empire. When Patrizia Reggiani marries into the Gucci family, her unbridled ambition begins to unravel the family legacy and triggers a spiral of betrayal, decadence, and murder.

programme.title: Bugsy
programme.desc: A cold-blooded killer who dreamed of Hollywood stardom, a crazed patriot who plotted against Mussolini, and the brilliant visionary who carved Las Vegas out of the dry Nevada desert, Bugsy had it all. Rating: R

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: Tom Hanks gives an astonishing performance as Forrest, an everyman whose simple innocence comes to embody a generation.

programme.title: Ali
programme.desc: Will Smith puts on the gloves and steps between the ropes as 'Ali,' arguably the most fascinating personality in sports history, in this biopic from Academy Award nominated director Michael Mann.

programme.title: Hugo
programme.desc: Set in 1930s Paris, an orphan who lives in the walls of a train station is wrapped up in a mystery involving his late father and an automaton.

programme.title: Stargate
programme.desc: When an ancient Egyptian artifact is discovered, two men unlock its secret power as a portal through time and space.

programme.title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence
programme.desc: In a future world, humans share aspects of their lives with companion robots called Mechas. But when an advanced prototype robot child named David is programmed to show unconditional love, his human family isn't prepared for the consequences.

programme.title: Hugo

programme.desc: In this visionary film, Will and Jake Grimm dazzle small towns with their imaginative folklore and elaborate illusions, only to discover many of the fantastic characters, and thrilling situations, found in their beloved fairy tales are real.

programme.desc: In hopes of wooing a girl, Tristan promises to bring her a falling star. He soon discovers the star is actually a celestial beauty named Yvaine. When an old witch, Lamia attempts to steal Yvaine's youth, Tristan must protect her.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín le promete a su hija que no la abandonará jamás, Pepa inspecciona la nueva habitación de su amigo y amenaza a Fernando con denunciarlo por abuso. Los Reyes le dan la bienvenida a Sara.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Hugo recibe a Aurora en sus brazos, impide que el doctor Max se quede con la bebé para sus propósitos, pero le miente a Soledad. Paquito anuncia que Alcides está vivo, pero tiene sus dudas.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad piensa que Hugo es Alcides y le confirma que es el padre de Aurora, para que no lastime a su bebé. Hugo está destrozado.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Esther y Antonia acusan a Úrsula y a Enrico de secuestrar a Aurora, Soledad los defiende delante del inspector Duarte. Beatriz mantiene oculto a su rehén y aumenta los niveles de tortura.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad amenaza a Alcides para que le regrese a su hija, ella sabe que Helena Burke la tiene. La búsqueda de Aurora despierta los más viles intereses en los enemigos de Alcides.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Lucas siente miedo y culpa tras matar por primera vez a una persona. Verónica reacciona con absoluta frialdad ante la noticia de la muerte de Prudencia. Ricardo consuela a Patricia por su pérdida. Maximiliano y Valentina tienen un encuentro íntimo.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro besa a Verónica y le confiesa que lo hace para recordar a Gabriela, ella reacciona fríamente. La señora Dantés se encuentra a David en el cementerio y escucha todo el amor que le profesa a su abuelo. Aníbal quiere acabar con Gertrudis.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La señora Guerra disfruta de haber separado a su hijastra de Maximiliano. Verónica sabe que Valentina será la próxima víctima. Además, descubre que la abuela de la joven fue envenenada. David no quiere viajar a Europa y se enfrenta a Antonia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro trata de indagar la conexión de los Suárez con la mina del Chamuco. La ira de Antonia cae sobre Cecilia. David no la defiende y Francisca la recibe en su casa. Verónica manda a Gertrudis a contratar a todo el personal del nuevo hospital.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Delante de Fernando, Gabriela echa a Sara de la hacienda y le dice que ha decidido quedarse sola con su esposo. Norma tiene un mal presentimiento mientras Dínora vigila día y noche a su presa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora amenaza a Gabriela con lastimar a Martín si la delata de nuevo con la policía. Armando y Rosario visitan a Fernando y se enteran de que Dínora se esconde en la hacienda Elizondo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Rosario le reclama a Dínora por obligar a Gabriela a echar a Sara, y le aconseja a Martín que huya de la hacienda. Fernando lo traslada al primer piso para que no descubra a su amante.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín le promete a su hija que no la abandonará jamás, Pepa inspecciona la nueva habitación de su amigo y amenaza a Fernando con denunciarlo por abuso. Los Reyes le dan la bienvenida a Sara.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four Teams mix it up in Brazil where Racers cry out in pain during a hairy situation as this season comes down to a race to the finish line when one Team will be crowned the winners and receive the 1 million dollar prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Emmy Award-winning The Amazing Race sets off for a new global adventure as Teams depart for Taipei, Taiwan. Plus, one team's position in the game is put in serious jeopardy when they lose their passport less than an hour into the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: When Racers discover that for the first time in THE AMAZING RACE history there is a double elimination, they are forced to step up their game. However, costly mistakes jeopardize multiple teams' chances at staying in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team is stranded in Indonesia as they watch their competition race by, and two Teams join forces to push through a mind-numbing mental challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams struggle with an underwater challenge which threatens their positions in the game, and one team’s love for the outdoors comes in handy during a tough climbing challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Fearing they have broken the rules, one team takes a risk that could cost them the Race. Meanwhile, an unwanted speed bump turns into a dream excursion for Liz and Marie, but will it push them even farther back.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After falling to the back of the pack, a disheartened racer is encouraged by the spirit of the local workers, and it’s an intense foot race to the first-ever Pit Stop in Malawi.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Malawi where a puzzling patriotic Roadblock causes one team to fall behind. Also, with a Double U-Turn on the line, teams must choose whether to sabotage their fellow Racers for a chance at first place.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race travels to Copenhagen for the first time, where one Racer learns the meaning of two left feet and a double U-turn jeopardizes team positions in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After a potentially game-changing error, one team hopes for a lucky break, and donning only a Speedo for their Detour task, Racers get in touch with their inner exhibitionists.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers put the pedal to the metal and shift into high gear when they take a thrilling test drive, and results are far from sweet when teams also try to recreate classic Belgian waffles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams make their way to Panama City, where they come face-to-face with their fears as they take in astonishing views of the city skyline.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After racing through 4 continents, 20 cities and nearly 40,000 miles, the final three teams race to Atlanta, Ga., where a smooth landing evades one team as their competition soars.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As 11 Teams depart Santa Barbara, Calif. for Santa Barbara, Argentina, one team struggles to keep their nerves at bay. Meanwhile, Teams quickly discover winning $1 million may be tougher than expected when they find themselves skydiving at 10,000 feet.

programme.desc: Andy is distressed when Opie receives a failing grade for his school essay naming him his most unforgettable character.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's comin' home to the Columbus Zoo in Ohio where he gives his grandkids a behind-the-scenes tour. Join in as they learn the ins and outs of zookeeping while meeting amazing animals like elephants, a clouded leopard, and a baby koala.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets creatures thriving in their tropical island homes, like the Bison of Catalina Island, Flamingos in Curacao, Sea Lions in the Galapagos, along with Bats, Dolphins, and a special island dedicated to Monkeys!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue head into the state-of-the-art Animal Care Center at Busch Gardens Tampa Bay to assist veterinarians performing an exam on a lion!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: The lush lands of Lope are home to rare and unique creatures like Forest Elephants, Forest Buffalo, and Red River Hogs. Plus loads of primates, and Jack has a close encounter with a gorilla!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Creepiest Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jack as he counts down ten of his creepiest encounters with venomous vipers, huge tarantulas, bats, bugs and a whole lot more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: The watery world of Dominica, one of the Caribbean's most pristine islands, provides Jack and his daughter Kathaleen with an unforgettable island adventure.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: The Atacama Desert in northern Chile is known as the highest and driest desert in the world. Jack wants to explore it all-from colorful flamingos to rare cats and even a newly discovered species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: After her floatplane touches down on Kulik Lake, Jack's daughter, Kathaleen, joins him in the Katmai region of Alaska for some brown bear watching and fly-fishing.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he heads back to his old stomping grounds near Knoxville, Tennessee! He takes his family to his old farm, the Knoxville Zoo, and the University of Tennessee for a special visit with Smokey the Dog.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: After an amazing helicopter trip to the remote location, Jack goes behind-the-scenes at a trout hatchery. Then he and Sue exchange practical jokes while fly-fishing along the Sun River.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family as they trek deep into the jungles of Rwanda and get a close-up look at wild, and extremely endangered, mountain gorillas.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is heading to Zimbabwe! Just around the corner from majestic Victoria Falls, the folks at Elephant Camp are working to provide a home to orphaned Elephants in need. Jack assists the team in radio collaring a soon-to-be-released female.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he discovers six creatures with supreme senses, like the animal with the most powerful snout, to a creature with razor-sharp eyesight. Crocs, Elephants, Sharks, Bats, Peregrine Falcons and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Meet impressive and iconic species, each representing their home continent, like Asian King Cobras, Australian Kangaroos, African Lions, Antarctica’s Penguins, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is lending a hand to Shamwari's world-renowned veterinarians and anti-poaching unit as they work on the front lines of conservation in South Africa.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack takes flight in Panama in search of Bats, Birds and other Jungle Creatures! Jack discovers how Bats are vital to Earth's pest control, and learns about one of the coolest adaptations in the animal world – echolocation!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Find out the answers to some of nature’s biggest mysteries! Why do gorillas spend so much time in trees, why do male lions have such shaggy manes, why do jellyfish live upside down? You’ve got questions, and Jungle Jack has the answers!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Picky Eaters
programme.desc: Feast your eyes on six species that take picky eating to the extreme! A panda that brunches on bamboo, marsupials that munch on eucalyptus, flamingoes that savor the flavor of algae, plus many more finicky eaters are on today’s countdown menu.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Rescued
programme.desc: Come along on an amazing adventure with some remarkable animals, like endangered cheetahs, an orphaned wombat, and even a grey whale, that are getting a second chance.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with the Hanna's as they visit two all-American Arizona zoos. They encounter Elephants, Big Horn Sheep, Rhino, Giant Tortoises and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Costa Rica, Jack becomes enthralled with the country's beautiful butterflies, including the Blue Morpho, the “Queen of the Rainforest.”

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his wife Sue are in Montana meeting up with some amazing people who are taking animal rescue to whole new level! First, a couple that left big city life to run a ranch dedicated to animals in need.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he explores Rwanda's legendary Akagera National Park. The storied landscape is making a comeback, and home to Maasai Giraffe, Hippos, Elephants, Crocodiles, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Living on the Edge
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack Hanna as he counts down the species that live their lives where other creatures fear to tread – right on the edge!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: River Adventures
programme.desc: Get ready to set sail with Jungle Jack for rolling river adventures from Africa to the Amazon! Rivers provide more than drinking water for wildlife- a river can also be a habitat, a hiding place, and even a runway.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Extreme Destinations
programme.desc: From the mountain gorillas of the Impenetrable Forest, the Andean cat of the Atacama Desert, to the penguins of Antarctica, join Jungle Jack as he counts down the most extreme animal destinations on the planet!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Wild Countdown is turning 100! Join Jungle Jack as he celebrates by counting down his favorite adventures.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear – kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson Investigation: Insurance torchings, mob burnouts and arson murders: these crimes are designed to take all clues with them. But a solid case can be built from a heap of ashes.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrives.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental “brain fingerprinting” technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.
